text.title: PMBoK 7 and 8 Reference Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: compute in evm-calculator.py; print formula + result
edition pinned → emit 7 or 8 canonical names; reject 8th in PMBoK 8
select one of Avoid/Transfer/Mitigate/Accept (threats) or Exploit/Enhance/Share/Accept (opportunities)
compute from threshold table; if portfolio >50% amber, recalibrate
